import io
import string
import list

fn main() -> Unit
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    process(line)
  when None
    print("")
  end
end

fn process(_ line: String) -> Unit
  mut nums: List<Int> = []
  mut token = ""
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
        if string.len(token) > 0
          match string.parse_int(token)
          when Some(v)
            nums = list.push(nums, v)
          when None
            ()
          end
          token = ""
        end
      else
        token = token + string.from_byte(b)
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if string.len(token) > 0
    match string.parse_int(token)
    when Some(v)
      nums = list.push(nums, v)
    when None
      ()
    end
  end

  let count = list.len(nums)
  mut out = ""
  mut j = count - 1
  while j >= 0
    match list.get(nums, j)
    when Some(v)
      if string.len(out) == 0
        out = "#{v}"
      else
        out = out + " #{v}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    j = j - 1
  end
  print(out)
end
